issue_reported: Air pressure drops below 5 bar under peak load.
action_taken: Replaced cracked compressor piston rings and gaskets.

issue_reported: Abnormal oil temperature reading (85C) in crankcase.
action_taken: Flushed oil reservoir, replaced thermostatic valve.

issue_reported: Unusual noise from drive belt during startup.
action_taken: Tensioned V-belts and aligned pulley shafts.

issue_reported: Automatic safety shutdown triggered due to overpressure.
